title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) analyst price targets and stock forecast information. The average one-year price target for BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. is $6.46, with forecasts ranging from a low of $5.05 to a high of $8.40. The average price target is $5.33 with a high forecast of $6.00 and a low forecast of $5.00. BBAI currently has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 2.00 on a scale of 1 to 5 (Strong Buy to Strong Sell), calculated based on the actual recommendations made by 4 brokerage firms.
